default.notes: Public WebVM Debian image. Development fallback only. Production Pages staging fails closed if the rust-alpine warm disk cannot be staged, because cargo and tree must be available by default.

warm.notes: Pre-baked rust-alpine.ext2 — i386 Alpine + bash + tree + rustc + cargo + a hello-world Cargo project rooted at /workspace. Built by web/disk/build.sh and uploaded as the rolling 'disk-latest' release asset. The committed manifest leaves warm.url unset; web/build/stage-pages-disk.mjs fills it with ./disk/rust-alpine.ext2 only after generating CheerpX GitHubDevice chunks in the Pages artifact. Production staging fails closed if the warm disk cannot be staged. The browser must not fetch the GitHub Release asset directly because its redirect target is not CORS-readable.
